verdict: CeraVe's body wash combines three essential ceramides with hyaluronic acid for effective cleansing without stripping moisture. It's a gold-standard budget option that balances efficacy with skin-barrier support.

_research.name: CeraVe Hydrating Body Wash
pros: Contains ceramides that restore skin barrier
Hyaluronic acid provides hydration during cleanse
_research.con: Contains phenoxyethanol as preservative, which some consumers prefer to avoid.
